sections.paragraph:
- Original: μήτιςμήτις

- Transliteration: metis

- Phonetic: may'-tis

- Definition:

1. let no one

2. hath any one

- Origin: from G3361 and G5100

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: From G3361 and G5100; whether any: - any [sometimes unexpressed except by the simple interrogative form of the sentence].
